nasb.text: Of Naphtali he said, “O Naphtali, satisfied with favor, And full of the blessing of the Lord, Take possession of the sea and the south.”

esv.text: And of Naphtali he said, “O Naphtali, sated with favor, and full of the blessing of the Lord, possess the lake and the south.”

cnv.text: 論到拿弗他利，他說： “拿弗他利啊，你飽受恩寵， 滿得耶和華的福， 可以取得西方和南方為業。”

ccb.text: 摩西祝福拿弗他利支派说： “拿弗他利人啊， 你们饱尝耶和华的恩宠， 满得祂的赐福， 拥有西方和南方的土地。”
